---
id: app-config-datastore-show
title: "Get bitrise.yml of a specific app"
description: "Get the full `bitrise.yml` configuration of an application, by providing the app slug. It returns the current `bitrise.yml` that is stored on bitrise.io in full, including the trigger map, the different workflows and the Steps."
sidebar_label: "Get bitrise.yml of a specific app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";
import NT from '@site/src/components/NT';

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get bitrise.yml of a specific app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/bitrise.yml"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the full `bitrise.yml` configuration of an application, by providing the app slug. It returns the current `bitrise.yml` that is stored on bitrise.io in full, including the trigger map, the different workflows and the <NT>Steps</NT>.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./app-config-datastore-show.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
